generator_prompt_injection:
REAL TEST-TAKER INSIGHTS (sourced from r/ACT, updated 2026-05-11):
- Coverage: Real test-takers report this exam covers breadth over depth. Stay at college 101 level on each topic.
- High-emphasis topics (per real students): math, english.
- Students struggle most with: reading. Generate proportionally more on these.
- Wording style: ~0% of items should use realistic exam-style indirection (NOT unfair ambiguity).
- Difficulty target: 30% easy / 50% medium / 20% hard. avg pass score 29 suggests easier test.
- Authenticity bar: students compare us to ACT class, practice tests. Match that register.
